title: Thai Jamaican Runner Beans
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired dish featuring Jamaican runner beans, crunchy fried rice, and intense flavors.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped peanuts and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the runner beans and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Add the Jamaican seasoning, soy sauce (if using), and stir to combine.
Add the fried rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional peanuts if desired.
